title: Get Ghost
lyrics: I know you thought you were coming hard Come a quick, but you're ghost, bitch You just toast, bitch, ayy, yeah I sprinkle all that shit on top of you Every time I bomb, every time I get on top of that, you know it's a dime Switch, motherfucker, shot, KD3, it's over Two-second truck, man, you're just leading in the Range Rover Bad daddy, fuckin' that, uh Bad mama, bought you that, uh Bet everything was real nice, real high Better than you thought, like it ever be But then the boogie man come at night, ayy Takes every day long that you didn't come back That you was called chromatic turn, a sign of energy, bitch That's how we know you'll get next, ayy Like it comes out of the night Like you come without a fight, you get ghost You get ghost Ayy, whether you're dead or whether you're gone Your family missin', you been wonderin' if you got locked up All the shit that you do, if you don't just call them If you wanted somethin', master more in your life But you're just out there, too bad for your travesty A vaticy of adolescence, can't you see your tears breakin' free? Get ghost, motherfucker, you get ghost, uh When the shots ring out, you get, yeah, you get ghost Uh, when the shot rings out, ayy, then you better get ghost Up in your mind, up in your mind You're always doin' that, you're runnin' away from every single crime Everything you did, man, you're just on bar nine Don't got 9 millimeter, feel it like you're not Mac Miller You're never gonna be the illest Never legendary, old guy sittin' there Playboating your negative ways so that you thought were clear Does it hit it when the world tells you get gone? Do you hate it when you're no longer fuckin' on? When you're not the right one, the wrong man Everybody told you what your problem, but You're gonna sit there and feel it, darling, take it away Ghost, ghost Just sit down to real and have it all go away You get ghost, get ghost Motherfucker made up this lie, made up the title Like I don't mean to say what I hate, Claude But your white idealistic design is just a fuckin' lie, duh Stop to free your comedy of lost in religion tragedy It's just a tragedy, okay? It's a tragedy with all these, these, these, these hoodlums, okay? Mm-hmm
